items.name: Urban LEO Standard Utility vest (Yellow font)
items.description:
Disclaimer: These items use 1024p textures, which have a chance to become minimized to 128p using R6. It's recommended you use R15 instead. If you're unsure about this purchase, test the item in a catalogue game first! Thanks!

Designed to be slim for easy maneuverability and comfort, the Tactical Enhancements standard utility vest is guaranteed to keep you safe and comfortable at all times while working a long shift. Favored by various law enforcement agencies for its' Kevlar material suitable against most lower caliber firearms or for small sharp objects, it's a must-have for those interested in living just a little bit more freely without being too restricted on movement.

items.name: Midnight Gothic Blouse [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegance wrapped in mystery. 🖤
The Midnight Gothic Blouse features a dark, corset-inspired design with dramatic flowing sleeves and lace-up detailing. Its distressed textures and intricate cuts make it perfect for gothic, fantasy, and roleplay avatars seeking a hauntingly beautiful style.

💡 Why You’ll Love It

Intricate corset-style design with button and lace-up details

Flowing tattered sleeves for a dramatic gothic effect

Dark, moody textures that bring mystery and allure

Perfect for fantasy, gothic, vampire, or roleplay outfits

🔍 Keywords: gothic, blouse, corset, fantasy, vampire, witch, black lace, medieval, dark fashion, elegant

🌙 Step into the night with timeless gothic grace.
